chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1373 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 27.10.2025 Mr. Kaleemullah Malano, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** The record indicates that the disability certificate annexed as Annexure "A," available at page 11, is not in accordance with the law. Accordingly, the petitioner is directed to obtain a fresh disability certificate from the Committee constituted in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, and thereafter approach the respondents for appointment under the disability quota, in accordance with law. In view of the above, the present petition, being not maintainable, is hereby dismissed in the aforementioned terms. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
